steps.t: Cuthred has sent you riding the bounds of Cliving: riding east of the city to the first marker, and then turning to your right at each new marker unti…
Ride to the second marker, south of the first, outside Cliving in the Norcrofts.
Ride to the third marker, west of the second, outside Cliving in the Norcrofts.
Ride to the final marker, north of the third, outside Cliving in the Norcrofts.
Cuthred is in Cliving, near the entrance to the city. You have ridden the bounds, and should now speak to Cuthred, Cliving's captain of the guard.
